bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University law graduate has been honored with a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship from the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law alumni association’s new executive committee takes charge for 2026–2028 term

bracu_official.title: BRAC University hosts workshops on case solving, strategic decision-making and ai
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University recently organized workshops focusing on enhancing skills in case solving, strategic decision-making, and artificial intelligence.
